nodes.label: Static Firebase Export
nodes.rationale: Firebase free (Spark) plan serves static assets only; SSR needs the paid Blaze plan, so the app is exported with output:'export' and all server logic moved to Firebase client SDKs.

nodes.label: Firebase Authentication (Google)
nodes.rationale: Replaced NextAuth: Google sign-in runs client-side via the Firebase Auth SDK, config-optional so anonymous localStorage play works without credentials.

nodes.label: Firestore Progress Sync
nodes.rationale: Per-user document users/{uid} = { completed: string[] } via arrayUnion, replacing Postgres/Prisma and the /api/me + /api/progress routes.

nodes.label: Client-side i18n
nodes.rationale: A static export can't run next-intl middleware or read cookies, so locale is swapped in-memory on the client with clean (prefix-less) URLs.

nodes.label: Free Access (no pricing)
nodes.rationale: The prepaid-pass pricing/invoice system was removed; every world is unlocked and worldLockReason returns only progress|null.

nodes.label: Master Account (testing bypass)
nodes.rationale: MASTER_EMAILS matched against the signed-in Firebase email lets worldLockReason return null, bypassing sequential progression for testing.

nodes.label: Sequential Progression Lock
nodes.rationale: Gentle pacing (finish the previous world to open the next) that makes the map a learning path; applies to everyone except master accounts.

nodes.label: Per-account localStorage Progress
nodes.rationale: Progress is scoped per account (by uid) in localStorage; anonymous progress is adopted into Firestore once at sign-in then cleared, so accounts never leak on a shared browser.

nodes.label: Curriculum Data Model
nodes.rationale: 20 worlds x 3 levels x 3 games = 180 games, data-driven from one file per world; index.ts auto-numbers by position with Code Castle kept last.

nodes.label: Six Game Engines
nodes.rationale: Order, robot-on-grid, pattern, choice, debug, plus the sandboxed JS CodeRunner; GameHost dispatches to the right engine per game kind.

nodes.label: XP & Ranks
nodes.rationale: +10 XP per completed game; 10 named ranks with thresholds spread evenly across all 180 games so the top rank lands on the finale.

nodes.label: Static-export Constraints
nodes.rationale: No cookies, middleware, rewrites, request-reading route handlers, next/image default loader, or dynamicParams:true; every dynamic route needs generateStaticParams. A build error is the main signal a constraint was broken.
